dj_text: Bring Det På "Ring Til Politiet" (Officiel Music Video) is dead. Blak & Jimilian - Slem Igen (feat. Ceci Luca) (Officiel Musikvideo) killed it. Justice served cold. And then there was one. Last track after this.
